name: Bran Muffins II
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Firm packed dark brown sugar
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix bran, buttermilk, molasses, and brown sugar until all liquid is absorbed.
2. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt into a large bowl. Stir in raisins if desired.
3. Add the beaten egg and melted shortening to the bran mixture. Pour the bran-egg mixture into the flour mixture and stir lightly with a fork until evenly moist.
4. Spoon batter into heat-resistant plastic coffee cup holders lined with paper muffin liners, filling each muffin cup about 1/2 full.
5. Place 6 muffins around the outside edge of the turntable, leaving the center empty. Heat uncovered in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the muffins comes out clean.
6. Repeat with remaining batter. Makes 12 muffins
